details: Beginning pipeline analysis. All evidence gathered: 4 breadcrumb files, 1 execution log, REPORT.md, op_design.md, .tdd_state.json, 11 git commits.

Report written to self_reflection.md. 5 issues found (2 HIGH, 2 MEDIUM, 1 LOW). 3 new entries added to pipeline-improvements.md (#12, #13, #14). Top finding: fp32_dest_acc_en + reduce helpers incompatibility on WH B0 cost 11 minutes.
